name: The Princess and the Pea Chronicles - Pig Tales
original_name: The Princess and the Pea Chronicles - Pig Tales
overview: Follow the adventures of Fearless, Hungry and Princess as they look over the Pig Kingdom in Karazeon.  With the help of the ever wise (and somewhat scatter brained) Sebastian, they learn many important life lessons about friendship, service, and humility.

trailers.title: Pig Tales | Series Opening | Feature Films for Families
